purpose: Fallback references for launch-critical URAI spatial assets. These are placeholder records, not final models.

urai_world_home_core_001.visual_intent: Premium spatial threshold world with galaxy above, walkable Ground below, portal affordances, and mobile-safe hero composition.

urai_world_ground_terrain_001.visual_intent: Reachable terrain surface below Home with real-life world staging, helper zones, and cinematic depth.

urai_world_sky_lifemap_001.visual_intent: Deep galaxy sky dome with memory stars, constellation depth, and upward-looking navigation.

urai_world_portals_core_001.visual_intent: Reusable route portals that feel like world travel instead of buttons.

urai_lifemap_memory_star_001.visual_intent: Selectable memory star that opens into Focus and Replay.

urai_lifemap_star_feedback_fx_001.visual_intent: Hover/tap/selected star glow, pulse, label reveal, and camera target feedback.

urai_focus_star_entry_tunnel_001.visual_intent: Camera fly-in tunnel from selected star into memory chamber.

urai_focus_memory_chamber_001.visual_intent: Interior chamber inside a memory star.

urai_replay_film_object_001.visual_intent: Spatial memory-film object inside the star world.

urai_ui_cinematic_loading_001.visual_intent: Cinematic branded loading state with no blank/generic frame.

urai_ui_passport_status_room_001.visual_intent: Passport and Status as world-layer rooms/control surfaces.

urai_particles_light_trails_001.visual_intent: Reusable light trails connecting stars, portals, focus fly-ins, and replay motion.
